feedback.text: The Digital Fairness Act is quite good on it's own but it's missing something. For years Game Developers and Publishers have taken away the video games we already bought. I Myself owned the video game "The Crew" which has since been shutoff in a way which makes it impossible to play again. It's not okay for these People to take away our goods which we have already bought. I think i can speak for almost every Gamer worldwide when i say that adding Laws for this kind of topic in the Digital Fairness Act would benefit Gamers worldwide greatly.
